title: Chain Reaction Creepers
description: This mod makes creepers explode when they take damage from another explosion.
body:
Don't auto download the mod, check whic version you are downloading first!

This mod makes creepers explode after taking damage from an explosion.
There are two version types, regular and instant.
regular makes creepers begin their ignition stage when damaged by explosion, giving you a few seconds to run.
instant makes the creeper detonate immediaitely, adding more risk.
